Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: A53


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Aquilifer's Eagle Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Stones start falling on the enemies for 5 sec. Every second, stones fall on 2 random enemies. When the stone hits the target, it deals 200000 physical damage and stuns the target for 1 sec. There's a 30% chance a magic stone will fall on the enemy, dealing 300000 magic damage and stunning the target for 1 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
